channel.title: DevCheap — Verified Developer Deals
channel.description: Verified deals on APIs, hosting, databases, and AI tools. Free credits, lifetime discounts, and limited offers curated weekly.

item.title: 1minAI — Lifetime License - $39
item.description: Pay $39 once vs. $40/mo for Midjourney ΓÇö GPT-4 + image gen in one lifetime deal All-in-one AI toolkit with GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and DALL-E in one subscription.

item.title: AdGuard — Lifetime Subscription - $11
item.description: Pay $11 once vs. $40/yr for uBlock Origin premium ΓÇö lifetime ad blocking Ad-blocker and privacy protection suite with DNS filtering, tracking prevention, and multi-platform support.

item.title: AI21 Studio — $10 Free Credits (3 Months)
item.description: $10 free Jamba API credits for 3 months ΓÇö test 256K-context models at no cost Jamba family LLM API (Jamba Large 398B, Jamba Mini 52B, Jamba 3B) all with 256K context window. $10 free credits valid for 3 months. No permanent free tier ΓÇö credit card required after trial.

item.title: AiAssistWorks Plus — Lifetime Plan - $29.99
item.description: Pay $30 once vs. $20/mo for ChatGPT Plus ΓÇö AI assistant without monthly fees AI-powered business assistant for content creation, data analysis, image generation, and task automation.

item.title: Airtable — $2,000 Credits
item.description: $2,000 in Airtable credits ΓÇö spreadsheet-database hybrid with automations, use code CARTA Airtable offers $2,000 in credits for Interfaces, Sync, and Extensions through the CARTA partnership. Spreadsheet-database hybrid with rich views, automations, and integrations. Perfect for project management, CRM, and data tracking. Enter code CARTA at signup.

item.title: Aiven — Free Tier (Postgres, MySQL, Redis)
item.description: Save $100+/mo on managed Postgres, MySQL, Redis ΓÇö free tier covers dev and staging Managed open-source databases including Postgres, MySQL, Redis, Kafka, and more.

item.title: Algolia — Free Tier (10,000 Records)
item.description: Free 10K records with typo-tolerant search saves startups $50/mo Hosted search API with typo-tolerance, faceting, and analytics. Free for 10K records.

item.title: Algolia Startup Program — $10,000 API Credits for Startups
item.description: $10K Algolia search credits for startups ΓÇö enterprise search API with typo-tolerance and AI recommendations Algolia Startup Program offers $10,000 in search API credits for qualifying early-stage startups. Access to hosted search with typo-tolerance, faceting, analytics, and AI-powered recommendations. In addition to the existing free tier (10K records).

item.title: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio — 1 Million Free Tokens Per Model
item.description: 1M free tokens per model on Qwen ΓÇö test Alibaba's latest LLMs including Qwen 3.5/3.6 Alibaba Cloud's Model Studio offering 1 million free tokens per model. Access to Qwen family models including Qwen 3.5 and Qwen 3.6. International account and credit card required.

item.title: Amplitude for Startups — 1 Year Free Growth Plan ($36K Value)
item.description: 1 year free Amplitude Growth ($36K/yr) ΓÇö enterprise product analytics with behavioral cohorts and experimentation Amplitude Growth plan free for 1 year for qualifying startups. Includes product analytics, behavioral cohorts, real-time dashboards, user paths, and experimentation tools. Single application gives $36K/year value.

item.title: Anthropic Claude for Startups — Up to $25,000 API Credits
item.description: $25K Claude API credits ΓÇö open to all early-stage startups, priority rate limits included Anthropic Startup Program offers up to $25,000 in Claude API credits for early-stage startups. Open to any startup with or without VC backing. Provides priority rate limits, community access, and resources. VC-backed companies or accelerator alumni may qualify for additional benefits.

item.title: Appwrite Cloud — Free Tier (75K MAU, 2GB storage)
item.description: 75K MAU free BaaS ΓÇö Firebase alternative with auth, database, storage, and functions Open-source Backend-as-a-Service with authentication, database, storage, and serverless functions. Free cloud tier includes 75,000 monthly active users, 2 GB storage, 750,000 function executions, and 5 GB bandwidth. No credit card required.

item.title: Asana — Free for Up to 15 Teammates
item.description: Free for 15 teammates ΓÇö project management with timeline, boards, and automation for growing teams Project management platform with timeline, boards, calendars, and workflow automation. Free tier supports up to 15 teammates with unlimited tasks, projects, and messages. Includes list, board, and calendar views. No credit card required.

item.title: AssemblyAI — $50 Free Credits (~185 hours)
item.description: $50 free speech-to-text credits ΓÇö transcribe ~185 hours of audio for free Speech-to-text API with high accuracy, speaker diarization, and content moderation. $50 free credits on signup.

item.title: Auth0 — Free for 7,000 MAUs
item.description: Free for 7K MAUs ΓÇö saves $30/mo vs. Auth0 Pro plan Authentication and authorization platform with social login, MFA, and free tier for 7,000 active users.

item.title: AWS Activate — $1,000-$100,000 Startup Credits
item.description: $1K-$100K AWS credits for startups ΓÇö Founders tier is automatic, Portfolio tier requires VC backing AWS Activate provides startups with $1,000-$100,000 in cloud credits, technical support, and training. Founders tier offers $1,000-$5,000 automatically. Portfolio tier (VC-backed) offers up to $100,000. Includes access to AWS services, support credits, and training resources.

item.title: AWS Bedrock Free Tier — 12 Months Free Claude Access
item.description: Test Claude via AWS Bedrock using $200 free credits ΓÇö no Anthropic account needed, works with onboarding tasks AWS Bedrock provides free access to Claude models using AWS's $200 free credits for new users. The credits work across 200+ AWS services including Bedrock. One of the onboarding tasks specifically involves running a model in the Bedrock playground, making it easy to test Claude without an Anthropic account.

item.title: AWS Free Credits — $200 Free Credits for New Users
item.description: $200 free AWS credits for everyone ΓÇö works on Bedrock/Claude, no startup program needed AWS gives $200 in free promotional credits to every new user. $100 automatically on signup + $100 for completing 5 onboarding tasks ($20 each). Credits valid for 12 months. Works across 200+ AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, and Bedrock (Claude models).

item.title: Axeptio — Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $30/mo for Cookiebot ΓÇö GDPR consent management at half the cost GDPR/CCPA consent management platform with customizable cookie banners, consent logs, and compliance workflows.

item.title: Backblaze B2 — 10GB Free Storage
item.description: 10GB free S3 storage ΓÇö cheaper than AWS for data egress S3-compatible cloud object storage with 10GB free and affordable egress pricing.

item.title: Baseten — $30 Free GPU Credits (One-Time)
item.description: $30 free GPU credits for model deployment ΓÇö test custom LLM inference on A100s/H100s GPU model deployment platform. $30 one-time free credits for deploying custom models or using the Model Library. Pay-per-minute GPU billing (T4: $0.63/hr, A100: $4.00/hr, H100: $6.50/hr). Credit card required after credits are exhausted.

item.title: Beam — $30/mo Free Compute Credits
item.description: $30/mo free GPU credits (with CC) ΓÇö open-source, fast cold starts, wide GPU selection Open-source serverless GPU platform. $30/month free credits (requires credit card; $1 without). Supports T4, A10G, A100, H100, RTX 4090. Sub-second cold starts, Python SDK.

item.title: Better Stack — Free Uptime Monitoring (100GB)
item.description: Free uptime monitoring with 100GB logs ΓÇö saves $20/mo over Datadog Uptime monitoring, log management, and status pages with generous free tier.

item.title: Brevo — 75% Off Annual Premium Plan
item.description: 75% off annual Brevo Premium ΓÇö all-in-one marketing with email, SMS, CRM, use code DEVDEALS Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) offers 75% off the annual Premium plan through devdeals.org. All-in-one marketing platform with email campaigns, SMS, chat, CRM, and automation. Premium tier includes unlimited contacts, advanced segmentation, and A/B testing. Use code DEVDEALS at signup.

item.title: BrowserStack — 30-Min Free Live Testing
item.description: 30-min free live browser testing on real devices ΓÇö quick cross-browser checks (paid plans start at $12.50/mo) BrowserStack's free trial includes 30 minutes of Live manual testing on real mobile and desktop devices (no CC required). 1 parallel test on Automate (requires CC). Paid plans start at $12.50/month for Live testing. Best for quick cross-browser checks.

item.title: Bruno — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source Postman alternative ΓÇö Git-native, offline-first, no account needed Open-source API client for testing REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket APIs. Git-native collaboration, offline-first, with collection-level authentication and pre-request scripts. No account required. MIT licensed.

item.title: Builder Deals Intel — Daily Builder Deals Brief
item.description: Daily brief of verified tech deals ΓÇö source-backed, risk-labeled, confidence-scored for builders Builder Deals Intel provides a daily operating brief comparing AI tools, SaaS, hosting, cloud credits, and developer infrastructure. Every item includes source links, risk labels, and confidence scoring. Tracks deals from GitHub Student Pack, Supabase, Neon, Sentry, Upstash, MongoDB, Clerk, and more.

item.title: Buildkite — Free for 3 Users, 5,000 Job Minutes/Month
item.description: 5K free CI minutes/month ΓÇö hybrid CI/CD with your own infrastructure, no credit card needed Hybrid CI/CD platform with your own infrastructure. Free tier includes 3 users, 5,000 job minutes/month, unlimited pipelines, and parallel builds. Runs on your own build agents for full control. No credit card required.

item.title: Cal.com — Free Cloud Tier
item.description: Free open-source Calendly alternative ΓÇö unlimited event types, self-hostable Open-source scheduling infrastructure. Free cloud tier includes unlimited event types, unlimited calendar connections, team scheduling, and customizable booking pages. Self-hostable version also available. AGPLv3 licensed.

item.title: Canva — 20% Off Pro Annual
item.description: 20% off Canva Pro annual ΓÇö graphic design with millions of templates, use code CANVASECRET20 Canva offers 20% off Pro annual plan. Graphic design platform with drag-and-drop editor, millions of templates, stock photos, and brand kits. Pro tier includes background removal, brand management, and team collaboration. Use code CANVASECRET20 at signup.

item.title: Cerebras Inference — 1M Tokens/Day Free (2,100 tok/s)
item.description: 1M free tokens/day at 2,100 tok/s ΓÇö fastest LLM inference available on cutting-edge hardware Cerebras provides ultra-fast LLM inference using Wafer-Scale Engine hardware. Free tier includes 1 million tokens per day at 2,100 tokens/second speed. Access to cutting-edge models optimized for Cerebras hardware. No credit card required.

item.title: ChatPlayGround AI — Lifetime License - $39
item.description: Pay $39 once vs. $20/mo for ChatGPT ΓÇö compare GPT-4, Claude, Gemini forever Multi-model AI chat interface that lets you compare responses from GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and other models.

item.title: Checkly — 20% Off Annual Plan
item.description: 20% off annual plan ΓÇö saves $60+/year on Playwright-based monitoring Synthetic monitoring for APIs and browser apps. Uptime checks, Playwright-based browser checks, and alerting.

item.title: CircleCI — 6,000 Credits/Week Free
item.description: 6,000 free CI credits/week (Linux) ΓÇö viable for small projects and open-source builds, 4 concurrent jobs, no CC CircleCI's free tier provides 6,000 credits/week (Linux builds), 1 user, and 4 concurrent jobs. Each credit covers ~1 minute of CI/CD build time. Useful for small personal projects and open-source. No credit card required.

item.title: CircleCI Startup Credits — $20,000 Compute Credits
item.description: $20K CircleCI compute credits ΓÇö scalable CI/CD with parallel testing for startup teams CircleCI offers up to $20,000 in compute credits for startups. Provides access to parallel testing, faster builds, and advanced CI/CD features. Perfect for teams that need scalable continuous integration and delivery pipelines.

item.title: Claude for Open Source — 6 Months Claude Max Free ($1,200 value)
item.description: 6 months Claude Max free ($1,200 value) ΓÇö for OSS maintainers with 5K+ stars or 1M+ downloads Claude for Open Source program gives qualifying open source maintainers 6 months of Claude Max 20x for free (total value $1,200). 10,000 total spots available. Eligibility requires demonstrated maintainer status on a meaningful OSS project with 5,000+ stars or 1M+ npm downloads/month.

item.title: Clerk — Free for 10,000 MAUs
item.description: Free for 10K MAUs ΓÇö saves $25/mo vs. Clerk Pro Authentication and user management for Next.js, React, and web apps.

item.title: ClickUp — 20% Off Workspace Plans
item.description: 20% off workspaces ΓÇö saves $100+/year on project management All-in-one productivity platform with docs, sprints, goals, and AI-powered project management.

item.title: Cloudflare — Free Tier (CDN, Workers, Pages)
item.description: Free CDN + Workers + Pages + D1 + R2 ΓÇö saves $200+/mo vs. AWS Free CDN, DDoS protection, serverless Workers, Pages hosting, D1 database, and R2 storage.

item.title: Cloudflare for Startups — $250,000 Enterprise Credits
item.description: $250K Cloudflare enterprise credits ΓÇö Workers, AI, CDN, DDoS protection for startups Cloudflare for Startups offers $250,000 in enterprise credits for qualifying startups. Access to Workers, Workers AI, CDN, DDoS protection, D1 database, R2 storage, and enterprise security features. Requires application and targets software companies with active websites.

item.title: Cloudflare Registrar — At-Cost Domain Registration
item.description: Cheapest domain registration available ΓÇö pay exact registry cost with no markup, free WHOIS privacy Domain registration with zero markup ΓÇö you pay only the wholesale registry cost plus ICANN fee. No hidden fees, no renewal surprises, no upsells. Free WHOIS privacy redaction, free DNSSEC, and Cloudflare DNS management. Typical .com domains around $9.15/year.

item.title: Cloudflare Workers AI — 10,000 Neurons/Day Free
item.description: 10K free neurons/day on Cloudflare's global edge ΓÇö ~200 LLM requests daily with no credit card Global edge inference platform with 10,000 free neurons per day (resets daily ΓÇö ~200 LLM requests). 50+ open-source models including Llama 3.3, Mistral Small, Qwen, Stable Diffusion XL, Whisper. No credit card needed. Runs on 300+ global data centers.

item.title: Cloudinary — 25 Monthly Credits Free
item.description: 25 free monthly credits for image/video optimization and CDN ΓÇö standard media transformation tool, no CC Cloudinary's free tier provides 25 monthly credits (reset each month) for image and video transformations, optimization, and CDN delivery. Includes 3 users and 1 account. Credits cover transformations, storage, and bandwidth. Low-volume but free. No credit card required.

item.title: CockroachDB Cloud — Free Tier (50M RUs + 10GB Storage/Month)
item.description: Free distributed SQL with 50M RUs + 10GB ΓÇö PostgreSQL-compatible, multi-region, auto-scaling database at zero cost Distributed SQL database with free Serverless tier. 50M request units/month, 10GB storage, multi-region replication, automatic scaling, and PostgreSQL compatibility. Ideal for global applications needing resilience without operational complexity.

item.title: Coda — $1,000 Credit
item.description: $1,000 Coda credit ΓÇö all-in-one docs/spreadsheets/apps platform, use code DEVDEALS Coda offers $1,000 in credits through devdeals.org. All-in-one doc platform that combines docs, spreadsheets, and apps. Features automations, formulas, and deep integrations. Use code DEVDEALS at signup.

item.title: Codeium — Free Tier (Unlimited Autocomplete)
item.description: Free unlimited AI autocomplete in 70+ IDEs -- Copilot alternative with zero cost for individuals AI-powered code autocomplete and chat. Free tier for individuals gives unlimited autocompletions and basic chat across 70+ IDEs. No credit card required.

item.title: CodeRabbit — Free Tier (15 AI Reviews/Month)
item.description: 15 free AI code reviews/month -- automated PR review saves hours per sprint AI-powered code review platform. Free tier includes 15 PR reviews per month with inline suggestions across GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket.

item.title: Cohere — Free Trial (1,000 API calls/month)
item.description: 1,000 free API calls/month for embeddings and RAG ΓÇö no credit card required Enterprise LLM API for embedding, RAG, classification, and text generation. Free trial with 1,000 calls/month.

item.title: Composio for Startups — $25,000 Credits
item.description: $25K Composio credits ΓÇö AI agent development tools with multi-model support for startups Composio offers $25,000 in credits for startups. Provides AI agent development tools, multi-model support, and enterprise-grade infrastructure for building AI applications. Access to cutting-edge AI capabilities and development resources.

item.title: Contabo — High-Spec VPS from $6.99/Month
item.description: 8GB RAM VPS at $6.99/mo ΓÇö best RAM-per-dollar in the VPS market, 4x competitors' specs at the same price Budget cloud VPS known for offering far more resources per dollar than competitors. Basic VPS S: 4 vCPU, 8GB RAM, 200GB NVMe, 32TB traffic at $6.99/mo. 14-day money-back guarantee. 9 global data center regions. 99.996% uptime SLA.

item.title: Coolify — Free & Open Source (Self-Hosted)
item.description: Free self-hosted Heroku/Vercel alternative ΓÇö deploy anything via git push on your own VPS Open-source self-hostable Platform-as-a-Service. Deploy Docker containers, static sites, Node.js, Python, PHP, and more via git push. Built-in auto SSL, reverse proxy, database provisioning, and monitoring. Requires your own VPS (~$5-10/mo). AGPL licensed.

item.title: CopyMail — Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $20/mo for BeeFree ΓÇö drag-and-drop email templates for life Email template builder and editor with drag-and-drop design, responsive templates, and team collaboration.

item.title: Credit for Startups — $1M+ Startup Credits Directory
item.description: Directory of 43+ credit programs worth $1M+ ΓÇö find and compare all available startup credits Credit for Startups is a comprehensive directory of 43+ credit programs worth over $1M total. Browse AI/ML credits (21 programs), Cloud credits (8 programs), and Developer Tool credits (18 programs). Includes programs from Google Cloud, Microsoft, AWS, Anthropic, Mixpanel, Sentry, and more.

item.title: Cron-Job.org — Free Cron Jobs
item.description: Free cron scheduling ΓÇö replaces costly cloud scheduler services Free cron job service for scheduling tasks and running scripts.

item.title: Cursor Pro for Startups — 1 Year Free Pro Plan
item.description: 1 year Cursor Pro free ΓÇö unlimited AI completions, codebase-aware chat, multi-file editing Cursor offers 1 year of Pro plan free for startup developers through SaaSOffers. Pro plan ($20/user/month) includes unlimited AI code completions, codebase-aware AI chat, multi-file editing, inline editing, codebase indexing, and custom model selection (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, etc.).

item.title: Cypress — Free & Open Source Test Runner
item.description: Industry-standard front-end testing ΓÇö free open-source test runner with time-travel debugging and real-time reloads Front-end testing framework for end-to-end, component, integration, and API tests. Free and open-source test runner with time-travel debugging, automatic waiting, and real-time reloads. Dashboard free for open-source projects with 5 users. No credit card required.

item.title: Databricks Startup Program — Up to $200,000 Credits
item.description: $200K credits across Databricks + Neon ΓÇö technical guidance and GTM support included Databricks Startup Program provides up to $200,000 in credits across Databricks and Neon. Single application gives access to all Databricks services. Includes hands-on technical guidance and go-to-market support. Purpose-built for early-stage, venture-backed startups building on data and AI.

item.title: Datadog — 14-day Free Trial + $100 Credits
item.description: $100 credits + 14-day trial ΓÇö test full APM suite for free Monitor infrastructure, logs, and applications with 14-day free trial.

item.title: Deepgram — $200 Free Credits
item.description: $200 free credits for speech AI ΓÇö real-time transcription and TTS without upfront cost Real-time speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and audio intelligence API with $200 free credits.

item.title: DeepLearning.AI — 1 Month Free Pro Membership
item.description: 1 month free DeepLearning.AI Pro ΓÇö full AI course catalog with labs and projects, use code AMDAIDEV22 DeepLearning.AI Pro membership gives you full access to the complete course catalog including hands-on labs, projects, and expert-led content. Get 1 month free exclusively through the AMD AI Developer Program. Code works for new DeepLearning.AI Pro members. Must join the free AMD AI Developer Program to access the code.

item.title: DigitalOcean — $200 Free Credits (60 days)
item.description: $200 free credits ΓÇö deploy VMs and K8s clusters to test before paying Deploy VMs, databases, Kubernetes, and serverless functions. $200 credits for 60 days.

item.title: DigitalOcean Startups — Up to $100,000 Credits
item.description: $100K DigitalOcean credits ΓÇö VMs, K8s, databases for startups under 6 years old DigitalOcean Startups program offers up to $100,000 in credits over 12 months. Access to VMs, Kubernetes, databases, and serverless functions. Targets startups less than 6 years old with less than $10M revenue. Affiliation with accelerator/incubator/VC can improve approval chances.

item.title: ElevenLabs — 10,000 Characters/Month Free
item.description: 10K free characters/month for TTS ΓÇö generate professional voiceovers at no cost AI voice synthesis and text-to-speech API with 10,000 free characters per month and 29 languages.

item.title: Emailit — Lifetime License - $49
item.description: Pay $49 once vs. $25/mo for SendGrid ΓÇö transactional email with no monthly bill Email sending API with high deliverability, analytics, and scalable infrastructure for transactional mail.

item.title: Excalidraw — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source whiteboard with hand-drawn style ΓÇö end-to-end encrypted, unlimited boards, no account needed Free open-source whiteboard with a hand-drawn feel. Unlimited boards, real-time collaboration, end-to-end encryption, image export, and diagramming tools. Self-hostable via Docker. No accounts or credit card required for the web version.

item.title: F6S Deals Platform — $500K+ Aggregated Startup Credits
item.description: $500K+ aggregated startup credits ΓÇö one-stop platform for AWS, Google Cloud, Stripe, and more F6S is a global networking platform for founders that aggregates deals, discounts, and credit opportunities. Access exclusive offers on hosting, design, software, email, and more. Connect with other startups, recruit talent, and apply for funding. Most AWS, Google Cloud, and Stripe credits can be accessed through F6S.

item.title: FastestVPN — Lifetime Subscription (10 Devices) - $29.99
item.description: Pay $30 once vs. $12/mo for NordVPN ΓÇö 10-device VPN for life VPN with 250+ servers in 50+ countries, ad-blocker, malware protection, and NAT firewall for 10 devices.

item.title: Figma — Free Starter Plan
item.description: Industry-standard design tool with a generous free Starter plan ΓÇö 150 AI credits/day, unlimited viewers, no CC Figma's forever-free Starter plan includes unlimited drafts and personal files, UI kits and templates, 150 AI credits/day (up to 500/month), unlimited viewers and commenters, and mobile app access. Pro ($12/mo) adds unlimited AI credits and version history. No credit card required.

item.title: Fin.ai Startup Pack — $500K+ Bundled Credits
item.description: $500K+ bundled credits across 50+ partners ΓÇö single application for comprehensive startup support Fin.ai Startup Pack bundles $500,000+ in credits across 50+ partners. Single application gives access to multiple high-value programs including cloud credits, AI APIs, developer tools, and business services. Designed to provide comprehensive startup infrastructure support.

item.title: Fireworks — $1 Free Credits
item.description: $1 free inference credits ΓÇö test fast open model API at near-zero cost Fast LLM inference API with $1 free credits on signup. Access to various open-source models including Llama, Mistral, and Qwen. Optimized for low-latency inference.

item.title: Fly.io — $10/month Free Credits
item.description: $10/mo free credits ΓÇö deploy globally with Docker at no cost Deploy full-stack apps globally with Docker. $10/month free credits.

item.title: FuseBase — Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $50/mo for Monday.com ΓÇö client portal + CRM for life Client portal and collaboration hub with project management, document sharing, and CRM features.

item.title: Gamma — Free Tier ΓÇö 10 Cards/Prompt
item.description: Free AI presentation and doc creation ΓÇö no credit card needed, 10 cards per prompt AI-powered presentation, document, and webpage creator with free tier. No credit card needed.

item.title: GetTerms — Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $20/mo for Termly ΓÇö cookie consent + policy generator for life Cookie consent, GDPR privacy policy, and terms & conditions generator with auto-updates and multi-language.

item.title: GitHub — Free for Public Repos
item.description: Free public repos with unlimited CI/CD minutes via Actions Free source code hosting with CI/CD, Pages, and Actions for public repositories.

item.title: GitHub Copilot Free — Free Tier (2K completions + 50 chat/mo)
item.description: 2,000 free completions + 50 chat messages/month ΓÇö industry-standard AI coding assistant, no credit card needed AI code completion and chat assistant. Free tier includes 2,000 code completions per month and 50 chat messages per month. Supports VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim, and other IDEs. No credit card required.

item.title: GitHub for Startups — 20 Enterprise Seats Free + $10K Credits (12 mo)
item.description: Covers engineering tooling for small teams ΓÇö Enterprise, Copilot, and Advanced Security for a year without the usual seat cost. Eligible early-stage startups get 20 seats of GitHub Enterprise free for 12 months plus $10,000 in flexible platform credits for Copilot, Advanced Security, Actions, and more.

item.title: GitHub Models — Free Tier (40+ Models, Rate-Limited)
item.description: Free frontier model APIs with just a GitHub account ΓÇö GPT-4o, DeepSeek-R1, Llama 3.3 at zero cost Free rate-limited API access to 40+ frontier models including GPT-4o, GPT-5, DeepSeek-R1, Llama 3.3 70B, and Mistral. Requires only a GitHub account. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at https://models.github.ai. Prototyping only per ToS.

item.title: GitHub Pages — Unlimited Free Static Sites
item.description: Most convenient free static hosting ΓÇö deploy from any GitHub repo, unlimited sites, free SSL, no CC Free static site hosting directly from GitHub repositories. Unlimited sites (1 per account + unlimited project pages), free SSL via Cloudflare, custom domain support, 100GB/month bandwidth, 1GB storage per repo. Built-in Jekyll integration. No credit card required.

item.title: GitHub Team for Startups — 1 Year Free Team Plan
item.description: 1 year GitHub Team free ΓÇö protected branches, required reviews, 3K CI/CD minutes for startups GitHub for Startups provides qualifying teams with GitHub Team plan free for 12 months. Team plan includes protected branches, required code reviews, 50 CI/CD minutes/month per user, 3,000 shared Actions minutes, code owners, required status checks, and advanced audit logging. Value: $252-$1,200+ depending on team size.

item.title: GitLab — Free DevOps Platform
item.description: Complete free DevOps platform with built-in CI/CD and container registry Free DevOps platform with Git repos, CI/CD, container registry, and project management.

item.title: Gitpod — Free for 50 hours/month
item.description: 50 free hours/month of cloud dev environments ΓÇö no local setup needed Cloud development environments that spin up instantly from any Git repository.

item.title: Google AI Studio — 1.5M Free Tokens/Day (Gemini Flash)
item.description: 1.5M free tokens/day on Gemini Flash ΓÇö no credit card, perfect for prototyping Google AI Studio provides free access to Gemini Flash models with 1.5 million free tokens per day. No credit card required. Includes access to various Gemini models with generous daily limits. Perfect for development, testing, and prototyping.

item.title: Google Cloud for Startups — $1,000-$350,000 Startup Credits
item.description: $1K-$350K Google Cloud credits ΓÇö AI-First tier offers $350K for AI-native startups Google Cloud startup program grants $1,000 to $350,000 in credits over 2 years. Tiers: Start ($1K), Build ($25K), Scale ($100K), AI-First ($350K). Credits cover all GCP services including Vertex AI, BigQuery, Cloud Run, Compute Engine, and storage. AI-First tier requires accelerator alumni status.

item.title: Google Gemini API — Free Tier (Flash models, 1M context)
item.description: Free Gemini Flash with 1M token context ΓÇö build AI apps at zero cost Google's multimodal AI API with free tier for Flash models featuring a 1M token context window.

item.title: Grafana Cloud Free — Free Tier (10K metric series, 50GB logs)
item.description: 10K metric series + 50GB logs + 50GB traces free ΓÇö full-stack observability at zero cost Full-stack observability platform with Grafana dashboards. Free tier includes 10,000 active series metrics (14-day retention), 50 GB logs, 50 GB traces (7-day retention), and 3 team members. Built-in alerting, on-call management, and incident response. No credit card required.

item.title: Groq — Free Tier (30 RPM, 14,400 req/day)
item.description: Fastest LLM inference at 30 RPM free ΓÇö no credit card, 240 tok/s on Llama 3 Ultra-fast LLM inference API with free tier supporting 30 requests/min and 14,400 requests/day. No credit card required.

item.title: Headway — Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $15/mo for Blinkist ΓÇö book summaries at 70% less lifetime Book summary app with key insights from non-fiction bestsellers ΓÇö personalized daily recommendations.

item.title: Hetzner Cloud — Γé¼20 Cloud Credit for New Users
item.description: EUR 20 cloud credit ΓÇö high-performance VPS at 60% less than AWS European cloud provider with affordable VPS, dedicated servers, and storage. Γé¼20 credit for new accounts.

item.title: Hoppscotch — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source API testing ΓÇö Postman alternative with zero cost Open-source API development platform for testing REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket APIs.

item.title: Hostinger — 80% OFF Web Hosting Plans
item.description: 80% off hosting ΓÇö shared plans start at $2/mo for developers on a budget Budget-friendly hosting with shared, VPS, and cloud plans. Includes free SSL, domain, and 24/7 support.

item.title: HubSpot — Free CRM + $1,000 Startup Credits
item.description: Free CRM + $1,000 startup credits ΓÇö enterprise sales tools for free CRM, marketing automation, and sales tools with generous startup program credits.

item.title: HuggingFace Inference Providers — $0.10/Month Free Credits
item.description: $0.10/mo free inference credits ΓÇö token-level pricing on thousands of open models from HuggingFace HuggingFace's official inference API with $0.10/month in free credits. Access to thousands of open-source models via serverless inference (limited to models under 10GB; some popular larger models also supported).

item.title: Hyperbolic — $1 Free Credit
item.description: $1 free inference credit ΓÇö test DeepSeek and Llama models at near-zero cost, no CC needed LLM inference API with $1 free credit on signup. Access to DeepSeek V3, Llama 3.3 70B, DeepSeek-R1, and Qwen models. No credit card needed.

item.title: ImageKit — 20GB Bandwidth + 20GB Storage Free
item.description: 20GB free image CDN with real-time transformations ΓÇö Cloudinary alternative with generous free tier, no CC Image CDN and optimization platform with real-time transformations, automatic optimization, and global CDN. Free tier includes 20GB bandwidth/month, 20GB storage, 2 user seats, and 1,000 transformations/month. No credit card required.

item.title: Incogniton — Lifetime License -
item.description: Pay once vs. /mo for GoLogin ΓÇö multi-account browser management at lifetime price Multi-account browser profile management with antidetect technology for secure online operations.

item.title: Inference.net — $1 Free Credit ($25 on Survey)
item.description: $1 free + $25 survey credit ΓÇö decent trial for testing open model inference LLM inference API with $1 free credit on signup and $25 additional credit for completing an email survey. Various open-source models available.

item.title: Intercom Early Stage — 93% Off Year 1 + Fin AI Free
item.description: 93% off Intercom year 1 with Fin AI free ΓÇö saves $3K-$10K on enterprise customer support platform Intercom Early Stage program offers 93% off the first year of the Support or Growth plan plus free Fin AI chatbot credits. Includes ticketing, live chat, knowledge base, and automation. Requires application through partner programs like FounderPass or Secret.

item.title: IONOS — 93% OFF All Hosting Plans + Free Domain
item.description: 93% off hosting + free domain ΓÇö cheapest entry point for new projects Web hosting, domains, VPS, and cloud solutions from a global provider. Deep discounts on hosting plans.

item.title: Kong for Startups — Up to $100,000 Credits + 50% Off
item.description: $25K-$100K Kong credits + 50% off for 2 years ΓÇö YC companies pre-qualified Kong for Startups offers up to $100,000 in Kong Konnect Plus credits valid for 12 months, plus 50% off list pricing for 2 years after credits expire. YC companies pre-qualified for full $100K. Most early-stage startups receive $25K-$100K. Covers AI Gateway, API Gateway, Metering, and Event Gateway.

item.title: Koyeb — Free Tier for Web Services
item.description: Free serverless hosting with global edge deploys Serverless hosting platform with global deployment, Docker containers, and free tier.

item.title: LaunchDarkly — Free Developer Tier
item.description: Enterprise-grade feature flags free ΓÇö unlimited flags, unlimited seats, 10M logs, no CC ΓÇö industry standard LaunchDarkly's free Developer tier includes unlimited seats, unlimited feature flags, 10M logs and traces, 5K session replays and errors, 5K AI assistant runs/month, 100 code references, and 14-day data retention. Enterprise-grade feature management platform. No credit card required.

item.title: Lightning AI — 80 Free GPU Hours/Month
item.description: 80 free GPU hours/month ΓÇö solid for learning/prototyping, not for production deployment Cloud AI development platform with persistent VS Code-like environment. 80 free GPU hours/month. Phone verification required. Best for learning and prototyping ΓÇö not for production serving.

item.title: Linear — Free for Open Source
item.description: Free per-user vs. $10/mo on Jira (standard) Issue tracking and project management for software teams.

item.title: Linode (Akamai) — $100 Free Credit for New Accounts
item.description: $100 free credit ΓÇö high-performance VMs at competitive pricing Developer-friendly cloud hosting with high-performance compute instances, GPU, and global data centers.

item.title: Loom — 25 Business Seats for 1 Year
item.description: 25 Business seats for 1 year ΓÇö async video messaging with HD recording, use code SU25DEEL Loom offers 25 Business seats for 1 year through a special partnership. Async video messaging platform with recording, transcription, comments, and viewer insights. Business tier includes HD video, custom branding, and team analytics. Use code SU25DEEL at signup.

item.title: Lucidchart — Free Basic Plan
item.description: Free diagramming with 500 shapes per doc ΓÇö 3 editable documents, real-time collaboration, no CC Diagramming and visualization tool for flowcharts, org charts, network diagrams, and wireframes. Free plan includes 3 editable documents, 500 shapes per document, real-time collaboration, and basic templates. No credit card required.

item.title: Microsoft for Startups — $5,000-$150,000 Azure Credits
item.description: $5K-$150K Azure credits ΓÇö Founders Hub offers instant $5K, Investor Network up to $150K Microsoft for Startups offers up to $150,000 in Azure credits. Founders Hub provides instant $5,000 tier accessible to all startups. Investor Network tier offers $100,000-$150,000 for investor-backed companies. Includes access to GitHub Enterprise, Visual Studio, Microsoft 365, and OpenAI API credits.

item.title: MinIO — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free S3-compatible storage ΓÇö self-hosted alternative to AWS S3 at zero cost Open-source S3-compatible object storage for on-premise and hybrid cloud deployments.

item.title: Miro — Free Team Plan
item.description: Free collaborative whiteboarding ΓÇö 3 editable boards, unlimited team members, templates included, no CC Collaborative whiteboard platform for brainstorming, diagramming, and workshops. Free plan includes 3 editable boards, unlimited team members, pre-built templates, basic integrations, and core diagramming tools. No credit card required.

item.title: Mistral AI — Free Experiment Tier (1B tokens/mo)
item.description: 1B free tokens/month on Mistral models ΓÇö no credit card, open-weight models Open-source LLM API with generous free Experiment tier offering 1 billion tokens/month. No credit card required.

item.title: Modal — $30/mo Free Compute Credits
item.description: $30/mo free GPU credits (with CC) ΓÇö run A100 or H100 inference, per-second billing, no idle cost Serverless GPU platform for AI/ML workloads. $30/month free compute credits (requires credit card; $1 without). Per-second billing, no idle costs. 10 GPU concurrency on free tier.

item.title: MongoDB — $0/month Free Tier
item.description: Free 512MB Atlas tier ΓÇö perfect for prototyping and small apps Document database with free tier for up to 512MB storage.

item.title: MongoDB Atlas Startup Program — $500ΓÇô$5K Startup Credits (12 mo)
item.description: Separate high-value startup credit program on top of the existing Atlas free tier. MongoDB Atlas startup credits for managed document database hosting on AWS, GCP, or Azure. Credits apply to paid Atlas tiers and include technical advisor support.

item.title: Mural — Free Plan (3 Murals)
item.description: Free workshop whiteboarding ΓÇö 3 murals, unlimited team members, voting and timer features, no CC Digital whiteboard platform designed for workshops and team collaboration. Free plan includes 3 murals, unlimited team members, pre-built templates, timer and voting features, and guest access. No credit card required.

item.title: N8Nitiator — Lifetime 1-Click Instance - $149
item.description: Pay $149 once vs. $50/mo for Zapier ΓÇö managed n8n automation at 70% off Managed n8n instance with pre-configured integrations, unlimited workflows, and isolated deployment.

item.title: Namecheap — Up to 50% Off Domains & Hosting
item.description: 50% off domains + free WHOIS privacy ΓÇö saves $10+/domain/year Register domains and get 50% off hosting plans. Free WHOIS privacy included.

item.title: Native.Builder — 1 Month Free Lablab Builder Plan
item.description: 1 month free Lablab Builder plan ΓÇö AI agents build and deploy production React apps from a single prompt, connect Fireworks AI for hackathon credits AI-powered software factory ΓÇö describe what you need and specialized agents plan, code, test, and ship a production React app. Sign up, go to Manage Plan > Change Plan, and enter promo code AMDXBUILDER for 1 month free Lablab Builder plan. Connect Fireworks AI API key in Integrations for hackathon credits.

item.title: Nebius AI — $2KΓÇô$150K Startup Credits
item.description: $2KΓÇô$150K AI startup credits ΓÇö only useful for registered companies with funding AI cloud platform for ML training and inference. AI Explorer: $2K cloud + $2K inference credits. AI Builder/Scaler: up to $150K (requires VC backing, legal entity, logo exchange). Not available to individuals.

item.title: Neon — $15/month Free Tier
item.description: Free $15/mo Postgres with branching ΓÇö instant database branching for dev workflows Serverless Postgres with branching, instant provisioning, and generous free tier.

item.title: Neon — Free Tier (100 Projects, Scale-to-Zero Postgres)
item.description: Best serverless Postgres free tier for modern stacks ΓÇö branch per PR, scale to zero, no credit card required. Serverless Postgres with 100 projects, 100 CU-hours per project/month, branching, instant provisioning, and scale-to-zero compute. No credit card required.

item.title: Neon Startup Credits — $100,000 Credits + Free Tier
item.description: $100K Neon credits + free tier ΓÇö serverless Postgres with branching for startups Neon offers startup credits of up to $100,000 for early-stage companies, plus their generous free tier. Serverless Postgres with branching, instant provisioning, and scale-to-zero compute. Perfect for startups building modern, scalable applications.

item.title: Netlify — 300 Credits/Month Free
item.description: 300 free credits/month on Netlify ΓÇö deploy unlimited previews, static sites, and serverless functions with no CC Netlify's free tier includes 300 credits/month (~$2 value), unlimited deploy previews, custom domains with automated SSL, serverless Functions (125K requests/mo), edge functions, and form handling. No credit card required. Credits cover build minutes, function executions, and edge invocations.

item.title: New Relic for Startups — 100GB + 5 Users Free + Startup Credits
item.description: 100GB free + 5 users on full-stack observability ΓÇö APM, logs, traces, and AI-powered insights for startups New Relic startup program provides 100GB of data ingestion free, 5 full-platform users, APM, infrastructure monitoring, logs, and traces. Full-stack observability platform with AI-powered error grouping and incident intelligence.

item.title: ngrok — Free Tunnel (4 endpoints)
item.description: Free secure tunnels ΓÇö expose localhost for testing webhooks without deploying Expose local servers to the internet securely with free tunnels.

item.title: NLP Cloud — $15 Free Credits
item.description: $15 free NLP API credits ΓÇö test various open models with a generous trial (phone verification needed) NLP API platform offering $15 free credits on signup. Access to various open-source models for text generation, embeddings, and classification. Phone number verification required.

item.title: Notion — Team Plan Trial + Bonus Credits
item.description: Free team plan trial ΓÇö all-in-one docs and project management All-in-one workspace for docs, wikis, databases, and project management with AI features.

item.title: Novita — $0.50 Free Credits (1 Year)
item.description: $0.50 free inference credits valid for 1 year ΓÇö minimal but enough for a quick API test LLM inference API with $0.50 free credits valid for 1 year. Access to various open-source models. Minimal but usable for a quick API test.

item.title: NVIDIA Inception — Free Membership + GPU Credits
item.description: Free NVIDIA Inception membership ΓÇö unlocks GPU credits and partner discounts for AI startups NVIDIA Inception program provides free membership with access to GPU credits, discounts, and technical support. Unlocks higher tiers at partner platforms like Nebius and CoreWeave. Includes investor intros, go-to-market support, and access to NVIDIA AI expertise.

item.title: NVIDIA NIM — Free Tier (1K-5K Inference Credits)
item.description: 1K-5K free inference credits on NVIDIA hardware ΓÇö test A100/H100 inference for free (phone verification often broken) Free LLM inference API with 1,000-5,000 inference credits. Access to 160+ models with ~50 free endpoints including Nemotron, Llama, Qwen, and DeepSeek. 40 requests per minute. Self-host available free on up to 16 GPUs. Phone verification required ΓÇö system is frequently reported as broken.

item.title: Nx — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source monorepo tool ΓÇö enterprise build caching at no cost Monorepo build system with intelligent code generation, caching, and dependency graph analysis.

item.title: Ollama — Free & Open Source
item.description: Run 100+ LLMs locally for free ΓÇö fully offline, no rate limits, OpenAI-compatible API Run large language models locally with a simple CLI and API. Supports 100+ models including Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, and Qwen. OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. No cloud dependency, no rate limits, fully offline. Mac, Linux, and Windows. MIT licensed.

item.title: OpenAI Startup Credits — $5,000-$50,000 API Credits
item.description: $5K-$50K OpenAI API credits ΓÇö access GPT-4/5 for qualifying startups through application OpenAI offers startup credits ranging from $5,000 to $50,000+ for qualifying startups. Access to GPT-4, GPT-5, and other cutting-edge models. Requires application and typically targets venture-backed or high-potential startups. Credits can be used for API access and model experimentation.

item.title: OpenRouter — Free Tier (30+ Models, 20 RPM)
item.description: Free access to 30+ LLMs via one API ΓÇö compare GPT-4, Claude, Gemini from a single endpoint Unified API for 30+ LLMs including free models with 20 requests per minute rate limit.

item.title: Oracle Cloud Free Tier — 4 ARM Cores + 24GB RAM + 200GB Storage Forever
item.description: 4 ARM cores + 24GB RAM free forever ΓÇö unmatched value for a permanently free VPS from a major cloud provider Oracle's Always Free tier includes 4 ARM Ampere A1 instances (up to 4 OCPU, 24GB RAM total), 2 AMD micro instances, 200GB block storage, 10GB object storage, and 10GB autonomous database. No time limit. Credit card required for signup.

item.title: PagerDuty — Free Tier (5 Users)
item.description: Free for 5 users -- incident alerting and on-call scheduling for dev teams Incident management and alerting platform. Free tier includes 5 users, basic alert scheduling, and 2 notification channels.

item.title: PayForm — Lifetime License - $49
item.description: Pay $49 once vs. $25/mo for Typeform ΓÇö payment forms without recurring charges No-code payment form builder with Stripe/PayPal, recurring billing, invoices, and customizable checkout.

item.title: Penpot — Free & Open Source (Self-Host or Cloud)
item.description: Best free open-source Figma alternative ΓÇö unlimited projects, unlimited team members, self-hostable, no CC Free and open-source design and prototyping platform. Figma alternative with unlimited projects, unlimited team members, 1GB cloud storage, SVG-native format, design systems, and developer handoff. Self-hostable on your own infrastructure for complete control. No credit card required.

item.title: PlanetScale — Free Tier (10GB)
item.description: Free 10GB MySQL-compatible database with branching ΓÇö $30/mo value Serverless MySQL-compatible database with branching and deploy requests.

item.title: Plausible — 30-Day Free Trial
item.description: 30-day free trial of privacy-first analytics ΓÇö cookie-less, GDPR-compliant, no CC required ($9/mo after) Plausible offers a 30-day free trial (no credit card required) of their privacy-focused web analytics. After trial, pricing starts at $9/month for 10,000 pageviews. Cookie-less, GDPR-compliant, open-source alternative to Google Analytics.

item.title: PocketBase — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source backend ΓÇö SQLite, auth, file storage, realtime in one binary Open-source backend with realtime database, auth, and file storage.

item.title: Polypane — Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $15/mo for BrowserStack ΓÇö responsive design testing without subscription Specialized browser for responsive design and web development with multi-viewport preview and accessibility audit.

item.title: PostHog — 1M Events/Month Free
item.description: Best free product analytics platform ΓÇö 1M events/mo, session recordings, feature flags, surveys, all open-source, no CC PostHog's generous free tier includes 1 million events/month, 5,000 session recordings, 1 million feature flag requests, 100K error tracking exceptions, 1,500 survey responses, and 50GB of logs. Open-source product analytics platform. No credit card required.

item.title: PostHog for Startups — $50K Startup Credits (12 mo) + Free Tier
item.description: Best-in-class product analytics suite for early-stage startups ΓÇö $50K credits make it effectively free while you grow. Product analytics, session replay, feature flags, surveys, and error tracking in one platform. Early-stage startups can apply for $50,000 in startup credits on top of the generous free tier.

item.title: Postmark — 1,000 Emails Free
item.description: 1,000 free transactional emails/month ΓÇö reliable delivery for startups Transactional email service with 1,000 free emails per month.

item.title: Railway — $5/month Free Credits
item.description: $5/mo free credits ΓÇö instant full-stack deploys with databases included Full-stack hosting with instant deploys, databases, and monitoring. $5 free credits monthly.

item.title: Redis Cloud — Free 30MB Tier
item.description: Free 30MB managed Redis ΓÇö caching and pub/sub for small projects Managed Redis database with caching, pub/sub, and vector search. Free 30MB tier.

item.title: Render — $5/month Free Tier
item.description: Free $5/mo tier ΓÇö deploy web services and databases with zero config Deploy web services, databases, and background workers for free.

item.title: Replit — Free Starter Plan
item.description: 100 free compute hours/month -- instant online IDE for prototyping without setup Online IDE with built-in hosting and databases. Free Starter gives 3 public repls and 100 compute hours/month.

item.title: Resend — $25/month Free Credits
item.description: $25/mo free email credits ΓÇö modern email API with great developer experience Email API for developers with generous free tier and pay-as-you-go pricing.

item.title: Retool — Free Tier (Unlimited Apps, 5 Users)
item.description: Best free internal tool builder ΓÇö unlimited apps, 5 users, 500 workflow runs, 20h agents, no CC Retool's free tier includes unlimited web and mobile apps, 500 workflow runs/month, 5GB database capacity, up to 5 users, 20 hours/month of Agents runtime, and 250 AI credits/month. Connect to any database or API to build internal tools. No credit card required. Self-hostable version available.

item.title: Rezi — Lifetime License
item.description: AI resume builder at lifetime pricing ΓÇö create ATS-optimized resumes without monthly fees AI-powered resume builder that creates ATS-friendly resumes and tailors them to specific job descriptions.

item.title: RocketScrape — Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $50/mo for ScrapingBee ΓÇö web scraping API with no monthly cap Web scraping and data extraction tool with API access, proxy rotation, and structured JSON output.

item.title: SaaSOffers — 50+ Verified Startup Deals
item.description: 50+ verified startup deals in one place ΓÇö instant claims for free tiers, applications for high-value credits SaaSOffers is an aggregator platform that verifies eligibility and provides direct application links for 50+ startup deals. Free-tier deals (Notion, Linear, Figma) can be claimed instantly. Higher-value credits (AWS, Chargebee, Mixpanel) require short applications. Total value can exceed $500,000 across all programs.

item.title: SambaNova Cloud — $5 Credits + Ongoing Free Tier (~200K tok/day)
item.description: $5 credits + permanent free tier at ~200K tok/day ΓÇö fastest inference on open models, no CC required Fastest inference for open models using custom RDU hardware. $5 free credits (~30M tokens on Llama 8B) plus an ongoing rate-limited free tier (~200K tokens/day, ~40 requests/day) that continues after credits expire. No credit card needed. Models include DeepSeek V3.1, Llama 3.3 70B, MiniMax M2.7, Gemma 4.

item.title: Scaleway — Γé¼20 Cloud Credits for New Users
item.description: EUR 20 cloud credits ΓÇö European cloud at a fraction of Big 3 prices European cloud provider with VMs, Kubernetes, object storage, and serverless functions.

item.title: Scaleway Generative APIs — 1 Million Free Tokens + 60 Min Transcription
item.description: 1M free tokens on EU-hosted models ΓÇö GDPR-compliant inference with Qwen 3.5 and Mistral Medium Scaleway's European cloud generative AI API offers 1 million free one-time tokens plus 60 minutes of free audio transcription. Access to 17 models including Qwen 3.5 397B, Mistral Medium 3.5, Gemma 4, and Llama 3.3. GDPR-compliant with EU data centers. Credit card and phone verification required.

item.title: Screpy — Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $30/mo for Ahrefs ΓÇö AI web and SEO analysis with page speed AI-powered SEO and web analysis tool with page speed tests, competitor analysis, and keyword tracking.

item.title: SenderStack — Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $40/mo for Mailwarm ΓÇö email warm-up without subscription fees Email warm-up and deliverability tool with automated sending sequences and inbox placement monitoring.

item.title: SendFox — Lifetime License - $49
item.description: Pay $49 once vs. $30/mo for Mailchimp ΓÇö email 5K subscribers forever Email marketing for content creators ΓÇö unlimited emails to 5,000 subscribers with a one-time payment.

item.title: Sentry — $100/month Free for Startups
item.description: $100/mo free for startups ΓÇö error monitoring without the enterprise price tag Error monitoring and performance tracking for web and mobile apps.

item.title: SiteGround — 75% OFF Web Hosting Plans
item.description: 75% off managed hosting ΓÇö optimized WordPress with top-rated support Premium web hosting with managed WordPress, WooCommerce, and cloud hosting solutions.

item.title: SiteGuru — Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $30/mo for SEMrush ΓÇö lifetime SEO audits at 80% off SEO audit tool that crawls your website and provides actionable recommendations for better rankings.

item.title: Snyk — Free for Open Source
item.description: Free open-source dependency scanning ΓÇö catch vulnerabilities before they ship Developer security platform for finding and fixing vulnerabilities in dependencies.

item.title: Sociamonials — Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $50/mo for Hootsuite ΓÇö schedule social media forever Social media management and analytics tool with scheduling, reporting, and QR code generation.

item.title: Sticky Password Premium — Lifetime Subscription - $29.99
item.description: Pay $30 once vs. $35/yr for 1Password ΓÇö password manager at 90% off Password manager with biometric login, cloud sync, form filling, and secure sharing across unlimited devices.

item.title: Stripe — $100 Free Processing Credits
item.description: $100 free processing ΓÇö test payment infrastructure at scale for free Accept payments, send payouts, and manage subscriptions globally.

item.title: Stripe Atlas — $2,500 Stripe Credits + $50K Partner Perks
item.description: $500 incorporation + $2.5K Stripe credits + $50K partner perks ΓÇö all-in-one startup launch package Stripe Atlas incorporates your startup as a Delaware C-Corp or LLC for $500. Includes $2,500 in Stripe product credits for payment processing and access to over $50,000 in partner discounts from AWS, Google Cloud, Notion, GitHub, MongoDB, and more.

item.title: Sturppy — Lifetime License - $19
item.description: Pay $19 once vs. $40/mo for ProjectionHub ΓÇö startup financial planning at a steal Financial planning and forecasting for startups with scenario modeling, runway tracking, and investor reports.

item.title: Supabase — Free Tier (2 Projects)
item.description: Free Postgres with auth, realtime, and edge functions ΓÇö Firebase alternative Hosted Postgres database with authentication, instant APIs, edge functions.

item.title: Support Board — Lifetime License - $69.99
item.description: Pay $70 once vs. $30/mo for Intercom ΓÇö self-hosted live chat with AI replies Self-hosted live chat and customer support ticket system with AI auto-replies and multi-channel integration.

item.title: Surge.sh — Unlimited Static Sites, Custom Domains
item.description: Simplest static hosting ΓÇö one CLI command deploys unlimited sites with custom domains, no CC needed CLI-based static web publishing with unlimited projects, custom domains, and basic SSL. Single-command deployment (surge). Supports SPA pushState routing, custom 404s, CORS headers, and password protection. No credit card required.

item.title: Tailscale — Free for 100 Devices, 3 Users
item.description: 100 free devices on zero-config WireGuard VPN ΓÇö the simplest, most modern secure networking for dev teams Zero-config WireGuard-based VPN for secure device connectivity. Free tier includes 100 devices, 3 users, subnet routing, MagicDNS, and ACLs. Works across all platforms. No credit card required.

item.title: Tally — Free Forever Plan
item.description: Best free form builder ΓÇö unlimited forms, submissions, logic, file uploads, e-signatures, payments, no CC Tally's free forever plan includes unlimited forms, unlimited submissions, conditional logic, file uploads, e-signatures, payment collection (Stripe), and Google Sheets integration. No user limits. Pro ($29/mo) adds workspace members, custom branding, and webhooks. No credit card required.

item.title: Teable — Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $40/mo for Airtable ΓÇö no-code apps without recurring fees AI-native no-code platform for building custom apps, CRMs, and project management systems.

item.title: TidyCal — Lifetime License - $29
item.description: Pay $29 once vs. $12/mo for Calendly ΓÇö breaks even in 3 months Alternative to Calendly with unlimited booking types, calendar integrations, and payment collection.

item.title: Together AI — $5 Free Credits on Signup
item.description: $5 free credits = several million tokens ΓÇö access 50+ open models including Llama 3.3 70B Together AI offers $5 in free credits on signup. Access to 50+ open-source models including Llama 3.3 70B, Mixtral 8x7B, and many others. At Together AI's pricing, $5 covers several million tokens. No credit card required for the free credits.

item.title: Turso — Free Tier (3GB)
item.description: Free 3GB edge SQLite ΓÇö global read replicas without the complexity Edge SQLite database for global applications with generous free tier.

item.title: Twilio — $15 Free API Credit
item.description: $15 free API credit ΓÇö test SMS, voice, email APIs before committing Cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, video, email (SendGrid), and authentication APIs.

item.title: Twilio SendGrid — $1,800 Email Credits
item.description: $1,800 SendGrid email credits ΓÇö cloud email delivery with 99.9% uptime, use code DEVDEALS Twilio SendGrid offers $1,800 in email credits through devdeals.org. Cloud-based email delivery service with 99.9% uptime, analytics, and deliverability tools. Includes transactional and marketing email APIs. Use code DEVDEALS at signup.

item.title: Umami — Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source Google Analytics alternative ΓÇö privacy-first, no cookie banner needed Open-source privacy-focused web analytics platform. Self-hosted with a simple JS snippet. No cookie banners required, GDPR-compliant by design. Track page views, events, sessions, and custom metrics. MIT licensed. Also offers hosted cloud option at umami.is.

item.title: Upstage — $10 Free Credits (3 Months)
item.description: $10 free Solar API credits for 3 months ΓÇö test Korean AI lab's LLM for free Solar Pro/Mini LLM API from Upstage (Korean AI lab). $10 free credits valid for 3 months. No permanent free tier.

item.title: Upstash — Free Tier (10,000 Requests)
item.description: Free 10K requests/day serverless Redis ΓÇö built for edge and serverless Serverless Redis and Kafka for edge applications.

item.title: Vercel — $10/month Hobby Plan Free (3 months)
item.description: $10/mo free for 3 months ΓÇö deploy Next.js apps with instant CI/CD Deploy frontend apps with automatic CI/CD. Free Hobby plan for 3 months.

item.title: Vercel AI Gateway — $5/Month Free Credits (Limited Models)
item.description: $5/mo free AI gateway credits ΓÇö unified billing and observability, but many models blocked on free tier AI gateway with unified billing and observability across providers. $5/month free credits for a restricted subset of models. Many premium models (Gemini 3, Claude Opus, DeepSeek, Grok) are blocked on the free tier. Best for Vercel ecosystem users.

item.title: Vercel Pro for Startups — 1 Year Free Pro Plan
item.description: 1 year Vercel Pro free ΓÇö 1TB bandwidth, team features, advanced analytics for startups Vercel offers 1 year of Pro plan free for qualifying startups through SaaSOffers. Pro plan ($20/user/month) includes team collaboration, 1TB bandwidth/month (vs 100GB free), advanced analytics, serverless functions with 60-second execution, Edge Functions, and preview deployments for every PR.

item.title: Vultr — $100 Free Credit (New Customers)
item.description: $100 free credit ΓÇö deploy bare metal or GPU instances to evaluate performance Global cloud infrastructure with bare metal, GPU instances, object storage, and 33 data center regions.

item.title: Webflow — $2,500 Startup Credits
item.description: $2,500 startup credits ΓÇö visual no-code web dev with CMS and hosting, use code DEVDEALS Webflow offers $2,500 in startup credits through devdeals.org. Includes visual web development, CMS, hosting, and SEO tools. Code DEVDEALS unlocks the credits at signup. No-code visual web development platform with fully managed hosting.

item.title: Whimsical — Free Forever Plan
item.description: Best free wireframing and diagramming tool ΓÇö unlimited team members, all file types, 100 AI actions, no CC Visual collaboration tool for wireframing, mind maps, flowcharts, docs, and sticky notes. Free plan includes unlimited team members, all file types, 100 AI actions, and unlimited docs. Clean, fast interface. No credit card required.

item.title: WordHero — Lifetime License - $89
item.description: Pay $89 once vs. $79/mo for Copy.ai ΓÇö 80+ AI writing tools for life AI writing assistant with 80+ tools for blog posts, social media, emails, and ad copy generation.

item.title: Workiom — Lifetime Discount
item.description: Lifetime discount ΓÇö flexible no-code project management at a fraction of Asana Flexible project management and no-code database platform with custom views, automations, and team collaboration.

item.title: Writecream — Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $49/mo for Jasper ΓÇö AI content at 90% less AI content writer with 40+ templates for blog posts, emails, ads, social media, and voiceovers.

item.title: xAI Grok API — $25 Free Credits + Data Sharing Program
item.description: $25-$175/mo free Grok API credits ΓÇö access cutting-edge LLM for free Grok API from xAI with $25 free credits for new users and up to $150/month via data sharing program.

item.title: YC Deals — $500K+ Worth of Deals for YC Companies
item.description: $500K+ worth of exclusive deals for YC companies ΓÇö 100+ tools with free credits and discounts Y Combinator provides current and alumni companies access to a private portal with 100+ discounts and exclusive offers on industry-leading tools. Includes deals from PostHog, Fivetran, OneSignal, Deel, Vanta, Gusto, GitHub, Algolia, Amplitude, and more. Total value exceeds $500,000 in free credits and discounts.

item.title: ZenCall — Lifetime License -
item.description: Pay once vs. /mo for Aircall ΓÇö AI phone agents in 16 languages at lifetime pricing AI phone agents that capture leads 24/7 in 16 languages with 7,000+ integrations.

item.title: Zendesk — 6 Months Free (Support + Sell)
item.description: 6 months free Zendesk Support + Sell ΓÇö ticketing, live chat, AI agents, use code DEVDEALS Zendesk offers 6 months free of Support Suite and Sell Suite through devdeals.org. Customer service platform with ticketing, live chat, AI agents, and CRM functionality. Includes omnichannel support and automation tools. Use code DEVDEALS at signup.

item.title: VocalBridge — 1 Month Free Developer Plan ($49 Value)
item.description: 1 month free VocalBridge Developer plan ($49 value) � 1,000 voice minutes, 5 agents, use code VBHACKMONTH Voice AI platform for building voice agents with 1,000 voice minutes, 5 agents, and 10 calls/day. 1-month free trial of the Developer plan ($49/mo) using code VBHACKMONTH from the DeepLearning.AI Voice AI Hackathon. Credit card required.

item.title: YouCam API — 1,000 Free API Units ($179 Value)
item.description: 1,000 free YouCam API units ($179 value) � skin analysis, beauty AR, VTO, use code YOUCAMHACK2607 YouCam face and body AR API suite including AI skin analysis, beauty AR, body segmentation, generative apparel virtual try-on, and more. 1,000 free API units ($179 value) for hackathon participants. Redeem at Account > Redeem Code after verifying email. Used by 800+ global beauty and fashion brands.
